title: Understandable Potions
body:
Pack changes textures of all potions to more unique ones. (Ominous Bottles also included)

Works on new vanilla features [25w03a (1.21.5) or newer]\
No Optifine Required

![Pack Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/76c7bf0d9c610eeacc3f8cf880ea1f90119d2add.png)
